pr.title: fix: onboarding flow — Hebrew name screen no longer hidden by agreement redirect
pr.body:
## Summary

Fixes the onboarding flow where the Hebrew name screen was immediately covered by the agreement/bylaws page after signup.

**Root cause:** After signup, Clerk redirects to `/onboarding` (Hebrew name form). But `AuthGuard` detects `hasAgreedToTerms === false` and immediately redirects to `/agreement`, hiding the Hebrew name form before the user can interact with it.

**Fix:**
1. **AuthGuard** — exempt `/onboarding` from the `hasAgreedToTerms` redirect (same pattern as the existing `/agreement` exemption)
2. **OnboardingPage** — after saving Hebrew name (or skipping), redirect to `/agreement` instead of home, so users complete both steps in order
3. **SignUpPage** — email/password signup now redirects to `/onboarding` consistently (previously went to `/`, while OAuth already went to `/onboarding`)

**New signup flow:** Signup → `/onboarding` (Hebrew name) → `/agreement` (terms & bylaws) → `/` (home)

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] **Sign up with a new account** — verify you see the Hebrew name form first, then the agreement page after saving/skipping
- [ ] **Skip the Hebrew name** — verify it still proceeds to the agreement page (not home)
- [ ] **Existing users** — verify signing in as an existing user who has already agreed to terms does NOT show onboarding or agreement pages

### Notes
- No Convex function changes — this is purely frontend routing logic
- The `/onboarding` route is already in the `PROTECTED_PREFIXES` list, so it still requires authentication
- Build passes with zero TypeScript errors

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/0a8f38d55ce2431ab17ad9708b8c14a3
Requested by: @elbitapmoC
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
